content.text: The chat logs are stored as `.jsonl` files in `~/.claude/projects/...`. Copying them to the project would preserve Claude Code's history (moving would break it). I'll copy all the conversation files to `ai-artifacts/`.

input.description: Create ai-artifacts dir and copy chat JSONL files
